criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence to enhance learning experiences.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, developer documentation, user reviews.

criteria.name: Educational Content Quality
criteria.description: The accuracy, depth, and relevance of the educational material provided.
criteria.sources: Educational expert reviews, user feedback, content analysis.

criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: The level of user interaction and engagement facilitated by the app.
criteria.sources: User reviews, engagement metrics, app analytics.

criteria.name: Personalization
criteria.description: The app's ability to tailor learning experiences to individual user needs.
criteria.sources: App features, user testimonials, developer information.

criteria.name: Accessibility
criteria.description: The app's availability across different platforms and its inclusivity features.
criteria.sources: App store listings, developer documentation, accessibility reviews.
